lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਹਉ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਉ ॥
lines.translit: har naam chhodd doojai lage tina ke gun hau kiaa khau |
lines.english: Those who have abandoned the Lord's Name, and become attached to duality - why should I speak in praise of them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤਿਅਹ ਕਹਤੀ ਸੁਣੀ ਰਹਤ ਕੋ ਖੁਸੀ ਨ ਆਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: kahatiah kahatee sunee rehat ko khusee na aayau |
lines.english: I listened to preachers and teachers, but I could not be happy with their lifestyles.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਦਯਿ ਮਿਲਾਯਉ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਜਿਵ ਤੂ ਰਖਹਿ ਤਿਵ ਰਹਉ ॥੨॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: gur day milaayau bhikhiaa jiv too rakheh tiv rhau |2|20|
lines.english: So speaks Bhikhaa: the Lord has led me to meet the Guru. As You keep me, I remain; as You protect me, I survive. ||2||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰੰਮ ਧਨਖੁ ਕਰ ਗਹਿਓ ਭਗਤ ਸੀਲਹ ਸਰਿ ਲੜਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhram dhanakh kar gahio bhagat seelah sar larriaau |
lines.english: Holding the bow of Dharma in His Hands, He has shot the arrows of devotion and humility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਰਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸਨਾਹੁ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਹੈ ਆਸਣਿ ਚੜਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: pahir samaadh sanaahu giaan hai aasan charriaau |
lines.english: Wearing the armor of Samaadhi, the Guru has mounted the saddled horse of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਲੋਭ ਮੋਹ ਅਪਤੁ ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਬਿਖੰਡਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh moh apat panch doot bikhanddio |
lines.english: He has cut down the five demons of unfulfilled sexual desire, unresolved anger, unsatisfied greed, emotional attachment and self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਹਰਿ ਅਟਲੁ ਮਨਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰ ਨੇਜਾ ਗਡਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: bhai nirbhau har attal man sabad gur nejaa gaddio |
lines.english: He is fearless in the Fear of the Eternal Lord God; He has thrust the spear of the Word of the Guru's Shabad into the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲਉ ਭੂਹਾਲੁ ਤੇਜੋ ਤਨਾ ਨ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨਾਥੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhlau bhoohaal tejo tanaa nripat naath naanak bar |
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas, the son of Tayj Bhaan, of the noble Bhalla dynasty, blessed by Guru Nanak, is the Master of kings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਸਚੁ ਸਲੵ ਭਣਿ ਤੈ ਦਲੁ ਜਿਤਉ ਇਵ ਜੁਧੁ ਕਰਿ ॥੧॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: gur amaradaas sach salay bhan tai dal jitau iv judh kar |1|21|
lines.english: SALL speaks the truth; O Guru Amar Daas, you have conquered the army of evil, fighting the battle this way. ||1||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਨਹਰ ਬੂੰਦ ਬਸੁਅ ਰੋਮਾਵਲਿ ਕੁਸਮ ਬਸੰਤ ਗਨੰਤ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghanahar boond basua romaaval kusam basant ganant na aavai |
lines.english: The raindrops of the clouds, the plants of the earth, and the flowers of the spring cannot be counted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਉਦਰੁ ਸਾਗਰ ਕੋ ਗੰਗ ਤਰੰਗ ਅੰਤੁ ਕੋ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: rav sas kiran udar saagar ko gang tarang ant ko paavai |
lines.english: Who can know the limits of the rays of the sun and the moon, the waves of the ocean and the Ganges?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਦ੍ਰ ਧਿਆਨ ਗਿਆਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਕਬਿ ਜਨ ਭਲੵ ਉਨਹ ਜੋੁ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: rudr dhiaan giaan satigur ke kab jan bhalay unah jo gaavai |
lines.english: With Shiva's meditation and the spiritual wisdom of the True Guru, says BHALL the poet, these may be counted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲੇ ਅਮਰਦਾਸ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੇਰੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਤੋਹਿ ਬਨਿ ਆਵੈ ॥੧॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: bhale amaradaas gun tere teree upamaa tohi ban aavai |1|22|
lines.english: O Guru Amar Daas, Your Glorious Virtues are so sublime; Your Praises belong only to You. ||1||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਵਈਏ ਮਹਲੇ ਚਉਥੇ ਕੇ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: saveee mahale chauthe ke 4 |
lines.english: Swaiyas In Praise Of The Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: eik man purakh niranjan dhiaavau |
lines.english: Meditate single-mindedly on the Immaculate Primal Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavat man hoe bigaasaa |
lines.english: Singing His Praises, the mind blossoms forth in ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਦ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad har gun sad gaavau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਰਿ ਜਨਹ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur poor janah kee aasaa |
lines.english: The True Guru fulfills the hopes of His humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev param pad paayau |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the supreme status is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਬਿਗਤੁ ਧਿਆਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: abinaasee abigat dhiaayau |
lines.english: Meditate on the Imperishable, Formless Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਪਉ ਗੁਣ ਬਿਮਲ ਸੁਜਨ ਜਨ ਕੇਰੇ ਅਮਿਅ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਫੁਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: janpau gun bimal sujan jan kere amia naam jaa kau furiaa |
lines.english: I chant the pure praises of that humble being who has been blessed with the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲੵ ਸਹਾਰੁ ਤਾਸੁ ਗੁਣ ਜੰਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: kalay sahaar taas gun janpai |
lines.english: Kal Sahaar chants His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਭੇਟੇ ਦਾਰਿਦ੍ਰੁ ਨ ਚੰਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: tis bhette daaridru na chanpai |
lines.english: Meeting with Him, one escapes poverty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨਿ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਬਦ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਯਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਉਰਿ ਧਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ein satagur sev sabad ras paayaa naam niranjan ur dhariaa |
lines.english: He served the True Guru and was blessed with the sublime essence of the Shabad, the Word of God. The Immaculate Naam has been enshrined in his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਿ ਕਲੵ ਠਕੁਰ ਹਰਦਾਸ ਤਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਸਰ ਅਭਰ ਭਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kav kalay tthakur haradaas tane gur raamadaas sar abhar bhare |1|
lines.english: So speaks KALL the poet: Guru Raam Daas, the son of Har Daas, fills the empty pools to overflowing. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਿਕੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਚਾਹਕੁ ਤਤ ਸਮਤ ਸਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har naam rasik gobind gun gaahak chaahak tat samat sare |
lines.english: He enjoys and savors the Lord's Name, and purchases the Glorious Virtues of the Lord of the Universe. He seeks the essence of reality; he is the Fountain of even-handed justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਪੀਵਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਪੁਬ ਜਿਨਹੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: te peeveh sant kareh man majan pub jinahu sevaa kareea |
lines.english: Those Saints who have served the Lord in the past drink in this Nectar, and bathe their minds in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੁਟਤ ਪਰਵਾਹ ਅਮਿਅ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੋਵਰ ਸਦ ਭਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: chhuttat paravaah amia amaraa pad amrit sarovar sad bhariaa |
lines.english: The stream of ambrosial nectar flows and the immortal status is obtained; the pool is forever overflowing with Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਭਉ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਅਨਭੈ ਪਦੁ ਦੀਨਾ ਸਬਦ ਮਾਤ੍ਰ ਤੇ ਉਧਰ ਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tin bhau nivaar anabhai pad deenaa sabad maatr te udhar dhare |
lines.english: God takes their fears away, and blesses them with the state of fearless dignity. Through the Word of His Shabad, He has saved them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਿ ਕਲੵ ਠਕੁਰ ਹਰਦਾਸ ਤਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਸਰ ਅਭਰ ਭਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kav kalay tthakur haradaas tane gur raamadaas sar abhar bhare |2|
lines.english: So speaks KALL the poet: Guru Raam Daas, the son of Har Daas, fills the empty pools to overflowing. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਮਤਿ ਗੂੜੑ ਬਿਮਲ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਆਤਮੁ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੁ ਭਯਾ ॥
lines.translit: satagur mat goorra bimal satasangat aatam rang chalool bhayaa |
lines.english: The True Guru's understanding is deep and profound. The Sat Sangat is His Pure Congregation. His Soul is drenched in the deep crimson color of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗੵਾ ਮਨੁ ਕਵਲੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਪਰਕਾਸੵਾ ਅਭੈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਘਰਹਿ ਲਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaagayaa man kaval sehaj parakaasayaa abhai niranjan ghareh lahaa |
lines.english: The Lotus of His mind remains awake and aware, illuminated with intuitive wisdom. In His own home, He has obtained the Fearless, Immaculate Lord.
